chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1505 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 20.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that earlier this Court has passed order dated 16.05.2024 wherein a number of petitions were disposed of with certain directions; however the same order is also applicable in the present petition, therefore, this petition may also be disposed of in view of the aforesaid order dated 16.05.2024. Learned AAG pointed out that the number of this Petition is also mentioned in the above referred order. When concerned Clerk from the Writ Branch was called, who on query of the Court submits that though the number of instant Petition is mentioned in the said order; however, on the same date, same bench has issued notices to the respondents, thereafter respondents Counsel filed vakalatnama and sought time. It reflects that this Petition was not disposed of and was pending and fixed before the bench. Learned AAG submits that this petition may also be disposed of in terms of the above referred order dated 16.05.2024 passed by this Court in a bunch of identical nature petitions The order dated 16.05.2024 passed in C.P No.D-69 of 2019 and others shall apply Mutantis Mutandis in this petition. The petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
